section.heading: Army National Guard of the United States: status when not in Federal service

content.p: When not on active duty, members of the Army National Guard of the United States shall be administered, armed, equipped, and trained in their status as members of the Army National Guard.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 103–337, div. A, title XVI, § 1661(a)(1), Oct. 5, 1994, 108 Stat. 2971.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 3079 of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(3)(A).

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Dec. 1, 1994, except as otherwise provided, see section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337, set out as a note under section 10001 of this title.
